name: prd-generator
description: Formal PRD generation workflow based on international standards, internally adapted by Bill Madeira and structured in this framework by Fabio Espindula

interface.shortDescription: Formal PRD workflow with explicit command entry and validation
interface.longDescription: Use PRD Generator to run a formal PRD workflow from the explicit /prd-generator command, generate a structured documentation package, validate the output, and keep reusable stack presets and examples aligned.
